description: A skill to evaluate how secure Firestore security rules are. Use this when Firestore security rules are updated to ensure that the generated rules are extremely secure and robust.
representativeQueries: Audit my Firestore security rules for vulnerabilities
Check if my Firebase rules allow privilege escalation
Validate that my Firestore rules are properly securing data
Test my Firebase security rules for data access bypasses
Review my Firestore rules for resource exhaustion risks
